SELECT toRelativeDayNum(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00');
SELECT toRelativeDayNum(toDate('1993-10-05')), toRelativeDayNum(toDate('2000-09-20')) AS relative_day_num FROM test_dates;
SELECT d.event_date, toRelativeDayNum(d.event_date) AS relative_day, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates dt WHERE dt.event_date < d.event_date) AS count_before FROM test_dates d;
CREATE TABLE reference_table (id UInt32, ref_date Date);
INSERT INTO reference_table VALUES (1, toDate('2000-01-01')), (2, toDate('2022-01-01'));
SELECT r.id, toRelativeDayNum(r.ref_date) AS relative_day_num FROM reference_table r JOIN test_dates d ON r.ref_date = toDate(d.event_date);
